content:
- Resumed task 27 from NOW EXECUTE state, monitored in-flight make test-bdd run to completion, and confirmed it passed fully (161 core tests + bdd/integration bins all green).
- Ran final gate make lint with strict restriction-lint settings; it passed cleanly. Verified required gate logs under .ralph/evidence/27-e2e-ha-stress/gates and wrote marker-grep evidence files for make-test and make-lint (both NO_MATCH for congratulations/evaluation failed markers, but gate exits were successful).
- Updated task file 27 status/acceptance: set <status>done</status>, <passes>true</passes>, added <passing>true</passing>, and checked all acceptance boxes. Added a new cross-task learning in AGENTS.md about avoiding false split-brain conclusions from non-atomic sampled dual-primary maxima.
- Ran /bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh successfully (updated current_tasks and sent completion email).
- Next immediate step: stage and commit all requested files (including .ralph artifacts/evidence) with required message format, then stop.

- Finalized task 27 and committed everything in one commit: 41934ea (task finished 27-task-e2e-ha-stress-workloads-during-role-changes: add HA stress SQL workload e2e coverage).
- Gates confirmed passing in evidence logs: make check, make test, make test-bdd, make lint (all with CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 RUST_TEST_THREADS=1).
- Task file marked done/true + <passing>true</passing>, task_switch completed, AGENTS learning updated, marker-grep evidence files emitted.
